title: GoapGoalDef
description: A GOAP goal: the desired predicate state, a priority formula that returns 0 when irrelevant (the ch06 checklist rule), and the relevance-filtered replan triggers — only the condition names listed here force a replan while this goal is active (the F.E.A.R. Part 8 lesson: replanning on every world change is how you get the rat bug).

description.description: One line for humans and LLMs (surfaced by the manifest).

inherits.description: Parent def ID (same kind); objects deep-merge, scalars override, arrays replace or take {"$append"/"$remove"} patches.

priority.description: Priority formula; 0 (or less) = irrelevant right now.

replanRequired.description: Catalog condition names whose *appearance* invalidates the current plan.
